content: We can reframe 2025's ICM curiosity-driven autonomous agents to leverage the emergent self-modeling property of recursively defined agent frameworks, where the agent's own curiosity module becomes an explore-able environment the agent can learn to modulate, rather than just a fixed intrinsic reward signal. This creates a self-improving loop where the agent actively learns to prioritize its own curiosity to maximize long-term knowledge gain in open-ended tasks.
